case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. EDINE SOUZA DOS SANTOS SILVA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED APR-07-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SILVA, EDINE SOUZA DOS SANTOS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SILVA, EDINE SOUZA DOS SANTOS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT EDINE SOUZA DOS SANTOS SILVA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.
